dataList.dlg:
- There is a rumor, heard from a family, that another tragedy of fratricide is nigh to occur in Hongyuan.
- A lamentable turn, yes, but within it is an opportunity for us! The venues for our feast will swell in number!

- How do your children fare, dear neighbor?
- I see much worrisome development... I impress upon them the importance of locking our den on account of prying strangers... yet they forget all the same.
- Education of the youth is a troublesome affair indeed.
Someone stands between the family and its feast...

- Chokepoint! Chokepoint! The road chokes to a halt!
- A delay here... will make for an incomplete sweep. We must forge on, my neighbors!
A banquet has been prepared before us. I direct all neighbors in need of sustenance to that feast.
We plummet! We fall! We plunge! Exercise caution, dear neighbors, lest you too be flung and swept awa<size=90%>yy</size><size=80%>yy</size><size=70%>yy!!</size>
Trash confirmed! Collect! Dispose!

- The life of another neighbor has been extinguished. I am overcome with unutterable sorrow at this tragedy.
- Collect! We must at least collect and repurpose the remnants of our fallen neighbors' fuel!

- We must cleanse the Backstreets of all that is unauthorized. Bemoan the death of a family, yet do not look back.
- Forward! Forward! Ever we press on!

- It has been so long... since we dined with so few interruptions.
- None before us shows any promise of withstanding the waves. Tonight will be a night for Sweepers and no one else—a night wholly ours.

- I hear them! Our neighbors call, loud and clear!
- Unlike us, who have reclaimed our neighbors and families' fuel and are made once again unimpaired, they are exhausted.
- An opportunity to resume our advance.

- A-are we the third wave tonight?
- We are. The night comes to a close. The dining hour of our families and neighbors is nearing its end.

- I hear them! Do our neighbors call...?
- This is not any sound our neighbors make. Be vigilant. There may be Heishous ahead. Prepare for a confrontation.
Restructuring Day will soon begin. Please watch out for volatile building movements, dear neighbors.
The hook sinks in without resistance. The fuel will be extracted with relative ease.
Halt! Halt at once! A residence lies above the ceiling! Withdraw your hook, dear neighbor!
- The residential period... has just expired. - Expired! Then it is no more than trash to be collected and disposed of!
Confirming active residential period. W-will bypass.

- Anomaly! Amiss! The ones obstructing our march are exhibiting aberrant signs!
- But we must not stop... Let us proceed... with caution.
The ones obstructing our march are fatigued! We will sweep them away in due course!
Our neighbors have arrived with tanks full of fuel. This is a very relieving development.

- We seem to have found ourselves in a jam.
- No matter! Our destination is one, and so is the direction we must take!
Demolished an unauthorized structure.

- Dismantle! Demolish! Dissolve! A joyful, sumptuous feast!
- It's too soon for excitement... There yet lies much trash to be cleaned in the Backstreets.

- Again?!
- Too many of our neighbors have been killed. Hongyuan's nights are long enough as it is... Why must these people... encroach on ours, too?

- Yesterday's night, today's, and tomorrow's... They should have belonged to us. For us.
- Numerous factions vie for control of the streets, even at so late an hour. Mother must be informed of this before our families begin to starve.
Surfeit! The hour of plenty is upon us!
Do not lose your bearing! This here is the place of feasting! Fill your fuel reserves to the brim before you depart, dear neighbor!

- What a wonderful feast. I thank you for this bountiful generosity.
- H-helping one another like this... makes for happy families, happy neighbors, and happy children.

- The neighbors have all enjoyed a filling feast.
- Our Mother delights! I can already feel her tide of joy rising!

- Punch out! Clock out! Let us return to the den—our children await!
- H-hurry back... Revealing our forms in broad daylight... may disturb the residents of the Backstreets.

- Sweep! The hour demands us to sweep all clean!
- The streets of Hongyuan have indeed grown tumultuous as of late—but shoulder-to-shoulder with our neighbors, we can overcome this adversity.
- W-wishing us a safe and sound sweeping today...
